mapper.select: SELECT a.attendance_id, a.employee_id, a.work_date, TIME_FORMAT(a.check_in, '%H:%i') AS check_in, TIME_FORMAT(a.check_out, '%H:%i') AS check_out, a.work_hours, a.overtime_hours, a.late_minutes, a.early_leave_minutes, a.daily_pay, e.name AS employee_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN employees e ON a.employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE a.employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY a.work_date DESC

SELECT a.attendance_id, a.employee_id, a.work_date, TIME_FORMAT(a.check_in, '%H:%i') AS check_in, TIME_FORMAT(a.check_out, '%H:%i') AS check_out, a.work_hours, a.overtime_hours, a.late_minutes, a.early_leave_minutes, a.daily_pay, e.name AS employee_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN employees e ON a.employee_id = e.employee_id ORDER BY a.work_date DESC, a.attendance_id DESC

SELECT a.attendance_id, a.employee_id, a.work_date, TIME_FORMAT(a.check_in, '%H:%i') AS check_in, TIME_FORMAT(a.check_out, '%H:%i') AS check_out, a.work_hours, a.overtime_hours, a.late_minutes, a.early_leave_minutes, a.daily_pay, e.name AS employee_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN employees e ON a.employee_id = e.employee_id ORDER BY a.work_date DESC, a.attendance_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (employee_id, work_date, check_in) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{workDate}, #{checkIn})
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance a JOIN employees e ON a.employee_id = e.employee_id SET a.check_out = NOW(), a.work_hours = ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, a.check_in, NOW()) / 60.0, 2), a.overtime_hours = GREATEST(0, ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, a.check_in, NOW()) / 60.0 - 8, 2)), a.late_minutes = GREATEST(0, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, CONCAT(a.work_date, ' 09:00:00'), a.check_in)), a.early_leave_minutes = GREATEST(0, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, NOW(), CONCAT(a.work_date, ' 18:00:00'))), a.daily_pay = ROUND(COALESCE(e.salary, 0) / 22) WHERE a.attendance_id = #{attendanceId}
